BindCfw.instanceType: Instance type, valid values: \[ eip \| nat \| etGateway \| peerconn \| csn \| ipv6Gateway ]
BindCfw.instances.region: Region, valid values: \[ bj \| gz \| su \| fsh \| hkg \| bd \| fwh \| sin ]
BindCfw.instances.instanceId: The ID of the associated instance
BindCfw.instances.role: PEERCONN-specific attribute, local role, valid values: \[ acceptor \| initiator ]; required when the bound or unbound instance is of type PEERCONN
BindCfw.instances.memberId: CSN-specific attribute, the network instance ID within the CSN; required when the bound or unbound instance is of type CSN
